title: SaaS OAuth & Integration Risk Defense
subtitle: Detect and contain OAuth token abuse, consent phishing, and SaaS data exfiltration

steps.title: Consent Phishing Campaign
steps.description: Attacker sends phishing emails with OAuth consent links to target organization.

steps.title: Illicit Consent Grant
steps.description: Victims grant OAuth permissions to malicious application with Mail.ReadWrite scope.

steps.title: Mailbox Enumeration
steps.description: Malicious app enumerates and downloads emails via Microsoft Graph API.

steps.title: Consent Abuse Alert
steps.description: Sentinel detects high-risk consent grant to unverified publisher.

steps.title: Bulk File Download
steps.description: App accesses and downloads SharePoint files using granted permissions.

steps.title: Data Exfiltration Alert
steps.description: Bulk API data access triggers exfiltration detection rules.

steps.title: OAuth Revocation
steps.description: CLAW revokes consent, disables app, invalidates all tokens.

steps.title: Data Impact Assessment
steps.description: Audit all data accessed by malicious app over 30-day period.

steps.title: Consent Policy Hardening
steps.description: Implement admin consent workflow and restrict user consent.

steps.title: User Awareness Training
steps.description: Deploy targeted training on consent phishing recognition.
